description: Dimension table configuration for members - BIS-style

dimension_tables.sql_script: SELECT DISTINCT ch."HICNumber" as planMemberID, ch."HICNumber" as subscriberID, ch."HICNumber" as beneficiaryID, ch."MemberLastName" as lastName, ch."MemberFirstName" as firstName, ch."MemberMiddleName" as middleInitial, ch."MemberDOB" as dateofBirth, ch."MemberGender" as gender, ch."MemberAddress1" as permanentAddressLine1, ch."MemberAddress2" as permanentAddressLine2, ch."MemberCity" as permanentCity, ch."MemberState" as permanentState, ch."MemberZip" as permanentZipCode, ch."MemberCountry" as permanentCounty, CURRENT_DATE as effectiveStartDate, NULL as effectiveEndDate, 1 as isCurrent FROM claim_headers ch WHERE ch."RecordType" = 'C' AND ch."HICNumber" IS NOT NULL
